description:
Plan §4b/§4c Stage 1 — repair-loop shadow-mode telemetry. Reads gold.repair_shadow_daily (populated nightly by the repair_shadow_aggregate Hatchet workflow). Drives the rollout-decision data for Stage 2 (terminal enable) and Stage 3 (low-cost loop enable). See docs/architecture/repair_loop_spec.md §8.

DATASOURCE REQUIREMENT: this dashboard expects a Grafana datasource named `PostgreSQL-GeoRAG` pointing at the `georag` database with a read-only role (e.g. georag_read). Bind it via Grafana provisioning or the UI; ALL panels target uid='PostgreSQL-GeoRAG'.

panels.title: Daily query volume
panels.description: Total queries per day across all workspaces. Stage 1 baseline — pre-rollout query rate.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT for_date AS time, SUM(total_queries) AS total
  FROM gold.repair_shadow_daily
 WHERE $__timeFilter(for_date)
 GROUP BY for_date
 ORDER BY for_date

panels.title: Guard-pass rate (24h)
panels.description: % of queries where every guard passed. The complement is queries with at least one fired guard code.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
    SUM(guard_pass_count)::FLOAT / NULLIF(SUM(total_queries), 0) AS pass_rate
  FROM gold.repair_shadow_daily
 WHERE for_date = (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day')::date

panels.title: Latency p95 (24h)
panels.description: p95 query latency from the previous full day. Tracks rollout impact on tail latency.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT MAX(p95_latency_ms) AS p95_ms
  FROM gold.repair_shadow_daily
 WHERE for_date = (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day')::date

panels.title: Workspaces active (24h)
panels.description: Number of workspaces that ran at least one query in the previous day.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT workspace_id) AS workspaces
  FROM gold.repair_shadow_daily
 WHERE for_date = (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day')::date
   AND total_queries > 0

panels.title: Top guard codes (last 7 days)
panels.description: Cumulative count per GuardErrorCode. Drives the Stage 2 rollout decision — which terminal surfaces to enable first based on what's firing.

targets.rawSql:
WITH expanded AS (
  SELECT jsonb_each_text(top_guard_codes) AS kv
    FROM gold.repair_shadow_daily
   WHERE for_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days')::date
)
SELECT (kv).key AS code, SUM((kv).value::INTEGER) AS firings
  FROM expanded
 GROUP BY (kv).key
 ORDER BY firings DESC
 LIMIT 16

panels.title: Top repair strategies (last 7 days)
panels.description: RepairStrategy.value frequencies — what the dispatcher WOULD have chosen if the loop were on. Drives Stage 3 rollout (low-cost-strategy enablement) cost sizing.

targets.rawSql:
WITH expanded AS (
  SELECT jsonb_each_text(top_repair_strategies) AS kv
    FROM gold.repair_shadow_daily
   WHERE for_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days')::date
)
SELECT (kv).key AS strategy, SUM((kv).value::INTEGER) AS firings
  FROM expanded
 GROUP BY (kv).key
 ORDER BY firings DESC
 LIMIT 13

panels.title: Budget-pressure distribution (daily)
panels.description: Per-day stack of comfortable / tight / over budget queries. Spikes in 'over' = context-prep needs tuning OR the rollout amplified context consumption.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT for_date AS time,
       SUM((budget_pressure_buckets->>'comfortable')::INTEGER) AS comfortable,
       SUM((budget_pressure_buckets->>'tight')::INTEGER)       AS tight,
       SUM((budget_pressure_buckets->>'over')::INTEGER)        AS over
  FROM gold.repair_shadow_daily
 WHERE $__timeFilter(for_date)
 GROUP BY for_date
 ORDER BY for_date

panels.title: Evidence-kind distribution (last 7 days)
panels.description: Sum of kind firings across all queries. Helps tune the per-intent QUOTA_BY_INTENT table — if 'graph' barely fires, lower its quota in factual_lookup to free context budget.

targets.rawSql:
WITH expanded AS (
  SELECT jsonb_each_text(evidence_kind_counts) AS kv
    FROM gold.repair_shadow_daily
   WHERE for_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days')::date
)
SELECT (kv).key AS kind, SUM((kv).value::INTEGER) AS firings
  FROM expanded
 GROUP BY (kv).key
 ORDER BY firings DESC

panels.title: Latency avg + p95 (daily)
panels.description: Both metrics on the same panel — gap widens when the long tail extends.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT for_date AS time,
       AVG(avg_latency_ms)::INTEGER AS avg_ms,
       MAX(p95_latency_ms)          AS p95_ms
  FROM gold.repair_shadow_daily
 WHERE $__timeFilter(for_date)
 GROUP BY for_date
 ORDER BY for_date

panels.title: Per-workspace summary (yesterday)
panels.description: Detail view — one row per workspace from the previous full day. Useful for catching workspaces that are firing a disproportionate share of guards.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT workspace_id,
       total_queries,
       guard_pass_count,
       queries_with_failures,
       avg_latency_ms,
       p95_latency_ms
  FROM gold.repair_shadow_daily
 WHERE for_date = (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day')::date
 ORDER BY total_queries DESC
 LIMIT 50

title: GeoRAG — Repair Loop Shadow Telemetry
